zh.lifeSummary: 當Thomas Howse於1545年出生在英國肯特易亞斯特維爾時，他的父親Phillip Hulse45歲，母親Margery Corbett31歲。他於1564年與Alice Hinton在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特維爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他去世於1580年在他的家鄉享年35歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭肯特易亞斯特維爾。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Thomas Howse于1545年出生在英国肯特易亞斯特維爾时，他的父亲Phillip Hulse45岁，母亲Margery Corbett31岁。他于1564年与Alice Hinton在英国英格兰肯特易亞斯特維爾结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和2个女儿的父母。他去世于1580年在他的家乡享年35岁，埋葬在英国英格兰肯特易亞斯特維爾。

nameMeanings.name: Howse
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: House
meanings: English: topographic or occupational name for someone employed ‘at the house’, from Middle English hous(e) (Old English hūs), probably a religious house such as a convent. In the Middle Ages the majority of the population lived in cottages or huts rather than houses.

English: perhaps a topographic name from an unrecorded Middle English huse, a southwest dialect form of Old English hyse ‘place overgrown with (water) plants’, a derivative of Old English hos ‘(water) plant’. In modern English, the name might have been absorbed into Huss or Hose .

nameMeanings.name: Thomas
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: New Testament name, borne by one of Christ's twelve apostles, referred to as ‘Thomas, called Didymus’ (John 11:16; 20:24). Didymos is the Greek word for ‘twin’, and the name is the Greek form of an Aramaic byname meaning ‘twin’. The given name has always been popular throughout Christendom, in part because St Thomas's doubts have made him seem a very human character.

historicEvents.title: Book of Common Prayer
historicEvents.description: Book of Common Prayer, a product of the English Reformation, was published in 1549 for assistance in the administration of the sacraments and other rites and ceremonies of the church according to the use of the Church of England. The book outlined morning, evening, and communion prayers and orders for baptism and marriage, thus making England a truly Protestant state.

historicEvents.title: Act of Uniformity
historicEvents.description: The Act of Uniformity was passed by the Parliament of England and required all people to go to church once a week. The consequence of not attending church was a fine of 12 pence, which was a considerable amount for a poor person.

historicEvents.title: State Lottery
historicEvents.description: A State Lottery was recorded in 1569. The tickets were sold at St. Paul's Cathedral in London.

historicEvents.title: The Royal Exchange is Organized
historicEvents.description: The Royal Exchange was organized in January 1571 by Sir Thomas Gresham. Gresham is known as the father of English banking.

en.lifeSummary: When Thomas Howse was born in 1545, in Eastwell, Kent, England, his father, Phillip Hulse, was 45 and his mother, Margery Corbett, was 31. He married Alice Hinton in 1564, in Eastwell, Kent, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 2 daughters. He died in 1580, in his hometown, at the age of 35, and was buried in Eastwell, Kent, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Thomas Howse est né en 1545, à Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre, son père, Phillip Hulse, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Margery Corbett, avait 31 ans. Il a épousé Alice Hinton en 1564, à Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 2 filles. Il est décédé en 1580, dans sa ville natale, à l’âge de 35 ans, et a été enterré à Eastwell, Kent, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.lifeSummary: Als Thomas Howse 1545 in Eastwell, Kent, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Phillip Hulse 45 und seine Mutter Margery Corbett 31. Er hat 1564 in Eastwell, Kent, England, United Kingdom Alice Hinton geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 2 Töchter. Er starb 1580 im Alter von 35 Jahren in seinem Geburtsort und wurde in Eastwell, Kent, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Howse è nato il nel 1545 nel Eastwell, Kent, England, il suo padre, Phillip Hulse, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Margery Corbett, aveva 31 anni. Lui sposato Alice Hinton nel 1564, nel Eastwell, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 2 figlie. Morì nel 1580, nel sua cittadina, all'età di 35 anni, e fu sepolto a Eastwell, Kent, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Thomas Howseが1545年にイギリスケントエアストウエルで生まれた時，父Phillip Hulseは45歳，母Margery Corbettは31歳であった。1564年にイギリスイギリスケントエアストウエルでAlice Hintonと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1580年に故郷で35歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスケントエアストウエルにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Thomas Howse(이)가 1545년 영국 켄트 이스트웰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Phillip Hulse(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Margery Corbett(은)는 31세였다. 그는 1564년 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트웰에서 Alice Hinton(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1580년 그의 고향에서 35세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 켄트 이스트웰에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Thomas Howse nasceu em 1545, em Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, seu pai, Phillip Hulse, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Margery Corbett, tinha 31 anos. Ele casou-se com Alice Hinton em 1564, em Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 2 filhas. Ele faleceu em 1580, em sua cidade natal, com 35 anos, e foi sepultado em Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Thomas Howse родился в 1545 г. в местности эаствелл, кэнт, Англия, его отцу по имени Phillip Hulse было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Margery Corbett, 31. Он женился на женщине по имени Alice Hinton в 1564 г. в местности эаствелл, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 2 дочери. Он умер в 1580 г. в его родном городе в возрасте 35 лет и был похоронен в местности эаствелл, кэнт, Англия, Великобритания.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Thomas Howse nació en 1545, en Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, su papá, Phillip Hulse, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Margery Corbett, tenía 31 años. Se casó con Alice Hinton en 1564, en Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo y 2 hijas. Murió en 1580, en su pueblo, a la edad de 35 años, y fue sepultado en Eastwell, Kent, Inglaterra, Reino Unido.
